message:
chore(release): sync embedded VERSION constant to 1.2.0

Update the embedded VERSION fallback in ru script to match the
VERSION file and release tag. The release workflow validates
that all version sources are consistent.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,7 +120,7 @@ fi
 #==============================================================================
 
 # Version: read from VERSION file, fallback to embedded
-VERSION="1.1.0"
+VERSION="1.2.0"
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/VERSION" ]]; then
     VERSION="$(cat "$SCRIPT_DIR/VERSION")"
